item.title: gsutil
item.description: Versioning Get the current versioning state: 1 gsutil versioning get gs://<BUCKET_NAME> Enable versioning: 1 gsutil versioning set on gs://<BUCKET_NAME> Upon deleting a file—version still exists.

item.title: Cloud Filestore
item.description: Overview File-based storage NAS Provision in zone—access via VPC using NFSv3 Use case: lift-and-shift migrations Read-only snapshots supported Tiers Tier Capacities Use cases Basic HDD: 1 – 63.

item.title: GCP Local SSDs
item.description: Overview Fastest block storage solution Attached directly to Compute Engine VMs Zonal 375 GB disks Expandable to 3, 6 or 9 TBs—combined into a single logical volume IOPs increase with disk size Data encrypted at rest Data lost when VM stops Best for transient data—media rendering, caches, analytics Can survive live migration References GCP Decision Trees

item.title: GCP Persistent Disks
item.description: Overview Disks independent of Compute Engine instance Data available after VM is shutdown Durable—data distributed across physical disks (99.

item.title: Cloud Storage
item.description: Overview Object storage Not suitable for file-based storage applications Infinitely scalable Highly durable (99.9999999%—eleven 9s) Unstructured data—images, videos etc.
